# Junior Workflow Settings

## Project
@project-name: cvm
@project-type: backend-only
@language: typescript

## Branches
@main-branch: main
@dev-branch:
@merge-strategy: direct

## Folders
@code: packages/
@backend: packages/
@frontend:
@tasks: tasks/
@docs: docs/
@tools:

## Commands
@test-backend: npx nx test <package>
@test-frontend: n/a
@build: npx nx run-many --target=build --all
@start-backend: npx cvm-server
@start-frontend: n/a
@migrations-add: n/a
@migrations-apply: n/a

## Ports
@frontend-port: n/a
@backend-port: n/a

## Deploy
@deploy-script: none
@deploy-docs: none
@domain: cvm.example4.ai
@backup-script: none
@restore-script: none

## Auth
@auth-method: none
@auth-notes:

## Database

@db-local: docker

## Methodology

@frontend-method: manual

## Testing

## Local Limitations
